---
title: "project"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(bayesrules)
library(tidyverse)
library(rstan)
library(rstanarm)
library(bayesplot)
library(tidybayes)
library(janitor)
library(broom.mixed)
```

## Week 8 Tasks

### Clean the dataset

```{r}
dataset <- read.csv("./data.csv")

summary(dataset$Gallstone.Status)
summary(dataset$Comorbidity)
```

```{r}
data <- dataset |>
  select(
    gallstone = Gallstone.Status,
    comorbid = Comorbidity
  ) |>
  mutate(comorbid = as.integer(comorbid > 0))
head(data)
```

### EDA

```{r}
data |>
  mutate(gallstone = if_else(gallstone == 1, "yes", "no")) |>
  tabyl(gallstone) |>
  adorn_totals(name = "total") |>
  select(gallstone, n)
```

```{r}
data |>
  mutate(comorbid = if_else(comorbid == 1, "yes", "no")) |>
  tabyl(comorbid) |>
  adorn_totals(name = "total") |>
  select(comorbid, n)
```

```{r}
data |>
  mutate(comorbid = if_else(comorbid == 1, "yes", "no"),
         gallstone = if_else(gallstone == 1, "stone", "no")) |>
  tabyl(comorbid, gallstone) |>
  adorn_totals(c("row","col"))
```

```{r}
df <- data |>
  mutate(comorbid = if_else(comorbid == 1, "yes", "no"),
         gallstone = if_else(gallstone == 1, "yes", "no")) |>
  rowwise()
df
```

```{r}
ggplot(df, aes(x = gallstone, fill = comorbid)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill")
```

```{r}
prior_model <- stan_glm(
  gallstone ~ comorbid,
  data = data,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  prior_intercept = normal(qlogis(0.0605), abs(qlogis(0.0605)) / 2, autoscale = T),
  prior = normal(log(1.1), log(1.1) / 2, autoscale = T),
  chains = 4, iter = 5000*2, seed = 84735,
  prior_PD = T, refresh = F
)
```

```{r}
neff_ratio(prior_model)
rhat(prior_model)
mcmc_trace(prior_model)
mcmc_dens_overlay(prior_model)
mcmc_acf(prior_model)
```

```{r}
set.seed(84735)
data |>
  add_linpred_draws(prior_model, ndraws = 1000) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = comorbid, y = gallstone)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = .linpred, group = .draw), size = 0.10, alpha = 0.30)
```

```{r}
set.seed(84735)
data |>
  add_epred_draws(prior_model, ndraws = 1000) |>
  group_by(.draw) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = .epred)) +
    geom_histogram(color = "white", binwidth = 0.05, boundary = 0)
```

```{r}
posterior_model <- update(prior_model, prior_PD = F)
```

```{r}
neff_ratio(posterior_model)
rhat(posterior_model)
mcmc_trace(posterior_model)
mcmc_dens_overlay(posterior_model)
mcmc_acf(posterior_model)
```

```{r}
set.seed(84735)
data |>
  add_linpred_draws(posterior_model, ndraws = 1000) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = comorbid, y = gallstone)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = .linpred, group = .draw), size = 0.10, alpha = 0.30) +
    labs(y = "prob of gallstone")
```

```{r}
# log(odds)
posterior_interval(posterior_model, prob = 0.95)
```

```{r}
# odds
exp(posterior_interval(posterior_model, prob = 0.95))
```

```{r}
set.seed(84735)
bin_pred <- posterior_predict(posterior_model, newdata = data.frame(comorbid = 1))
```

```{r}
#| warning: False
mcmc_hist(bin_pred) + labs(x = "Y")
```

```{r}
table(bin_pred)
```

```{r}
colMeans(bin_pred)
```

```{r}
proportion_gallstone <- function(x){mean(x == 1)}
pp_check(posterior_model, nreps = 1000,
         plotfun = "stat", stat = "proportion_gallstone") + 
  xlab("probability of gallstone")
```

```{r}
set.seed(84735)
classification_summary(model = posterior_model, data = data, cutoff = 0.5)
```

```{r}
set.seed(84735)
cv_accuracy <- classification_summary_cv(
  model = posterior_model, data = data, cutoff = 0.5, k = 10)
```

```{r}
cv_accuracy
```

```{r}
# log(odds)
tidy(posterior_model, effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE, conf.level = 0.95)
```
